title: Unskippable Hardcore
description: Type /enablehardcore for a trully unskippable hardcore mode ( you can't even turn on cheats after death ). Works on existing worlds.
body: Rules are simple, you type /enablehardcore on chat and you have ONLY ONE LIFE. After that, game kills you instantly after respawn so you have to uninstall the mod to continue, harder version of cheating the hardcore ( now impossible on servers )
